_comment: Anchor articles that define the scoring scale. Add/edit freely. The model scores all new articles relative to these. Promote high-confidence DB articles here to improve calibration over time.

anchors.text: RBI Monetary Policy Committee cuts repo rate by 25 basis points to 6.00%, citing easing headline inflation at 4.2% and need to support GDP growth. Decision was unanimous. Governor signals accommodative stance could continue if inflation stays in band.

SEBI introduces stricter disclosure norms for related-party transactions above Rs 1,000 crore, effective Q3. Listed companies must seek shareholder approval for deals with promoter entities. Analysts flag Adani Group entities and Reliance as most impacted.

TCS Q2 FY25 results: Revenue Rs 61,467 crore, up 8.9% YoY, beating analyst estimate of Rs 60,200 crore. Net profit Rs 11,909 crore, up 5% YoY. EBIT margin 24.1%, in line. Deal wins TCV .6B, highest in six quarters. Management raises FY25 guidance.

Infosys Q2 FY25: Revenue .71B, up 3.1% YoY in USD terms, in line with estimates. Net profit Rs 6,506 crore. Revised FY25 revenue guidance to 3.75-4.5% from 3-4%. Headcount flat. Management cautious on discretionary spend recovery.

India CPI inflation for September came in at 5.49%, above the RBI upper tolerance band of 6% for the second consecutive month. Food inflation at 9.2% driven by vegetable prices. Economists now push back rate cut expectations to Q2 FY26.

Sun Pharmaceutical acquires US-based specialty pharma firm Checkpoint Therapeutics for 55 million in an all-cash deal. The acquisition adds two FDA-approved oncology assets and a pipeline of 6 candidates. Street estimates accretion from FY27.

Reliance Jio launches JioAirFiber in 100 new cities, pricing plans starting Rs 599/month for 30 Mbps. Company targets 20 million FTTH subscribers by FY26. Analysts flag threat to Airtel broadband market share in Tier 2 cities.

HDFC Bank MD and CEO Sashidhar Jagdishan to retire in October 2026. Board has initiated succession planning; no internal candidate named yet. Analysts flag transition risk given the bank is mid-way through its merger integration with HDFC Ltd.

Motilal Oswal initiates coverage on Larsen & Toubro with Buy rating and target price Rs 4,200, implying 18% upside. Analyst cites Rs 10 lakh crore order book, strong defence pipeline, and data centre opportunity as key catalysts.

Global crude oil prices fell 3.8% to 1 per barrel after OPEC+ decided to proceed with planned production increase of 180,000 bpd from December. IEA cuts 2025 demand growth forecast citing China slowdown. Brent crude at 14-month low.

JSW Steel reports Q2 FY25 EBITDA of Rs 4,200 crore, down 22% YoY and 8% below consensus. Steel realisations fell Rs 2,800/tonne on Chinese dumping pressure. Management cuts volume guidance for FY25 by 5%. Stock falls 6% intraday.

Hindustan Unilever launches new premium skincare line under its Lakme brand targeting urban millennials. Company will invest Rs 150 crore in marketing over FY25. Analysts see limited near-term P&L impact; long-term premiumisation play.
